title: Expanded region availability for ai_parse_document
body:
`ai_parse_document` is now available in the following regions:

* `us-west-2`
* `us-east-1`
* `us-east-2`
* `ap-northeast-1`
* `ap-northeast-2`
* `ap-south-1`
* `ap-southeast-1`
* `ap-southeast-2`
* `ca-central-1`
* `eu-central-1`
* `eu-west-1`
* `eu-west-2`
* `sa-east-1`

See [`ai_parse_document` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_parse_document).
